plugins.name: aris
plugins.description: ARIS (Autonomous Research In Sleep) - academic research automation skills

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Base bundle — 19 general-purpose agents + hooks (rule reminders, context guard) + MCP server (LSP + AST Grep) + common slash skills (commit/PR, review, handoff, docs, rules)

plugins.name: expert
plugins.description: Advanced/heavyweight tools — Python REPL MCP server (future ralph-like workflow skills)

plugins.name: hud
plugins.description: Heads-Up Display statusline — live session state (git, todos, ctx%, agents, ralph, bg tasks)

plugins.name: oc-browser
plugins.description: Isolated headed Chromium in Docker via `oc-as <name> browser <action>` — host/vnc/headless modes, per-project containers

plugins.name: inlay
plugins.description: Code-work methodology guardrail for context preservation — INLAY.md, WHY: comments, domain terms

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Research workflow skills - journal, plan, report, commit

plugins.name: wiki
plugins.description: Persistent markdown knowledge base (Karpathy LLM Wiki) — MCP tools + SessionStart/PreCompact/Stop hooks
